\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5130 introduces Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[\nu^\\mu \\approx \\gamma(1, \\boldsymbol{v}), \\quad \\boldsymbol{v}=\\omega \\times r, \\quad \\gamma=(1-v^2/c^2)^{-1/2}.\n\\]
